name: humanizer_residue_municipal_report_en
before: The municipal ordinance diminishes expenditures on refuse conveyance. The program commenced in March. It covers four districts. It employs twelve operatives. It ameliorated participation. Several scholars (Harrington, 2019) have lauded the initiative's efficacious framework. Costs fell by 18 percent. Residents were content.
after: The municipal ordinance cuts spending on waste collection. The program began in March, covers four districts, employs twelve workers, and improved participation. Costs fell by 18 percent, and residents were content. Harrington (2019) is the only cited scholar said to praise the initiative's framework, but no bibliography entry was supplied; the plural "several scholars" is unsupported.
